# Dremio Cloud

Analyze and get insights from your lakehouse data

-   More
    
    [Documentation](https://docs.dremio.com/cloud/sonar/mcp-server/)[Privacy Policy](https://www.dremio.com/legal/privacy-policy/)[Support](/cdn-cgi/l/email-protection#b4c7c1c4c4dbc6c0f4d0c6d1d9dddb9ad7dbd9)
    

Dremio provides a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that allows AI agents to securely access, query, and reason over enterprise lakehouse data through Dremio's unified semantic layer. With Dremio's MCP offering, agents interact with data exactly as users do in Dremio—respecting fine-grained access controls, row- and column-level security, and shared business definitions. Queries are executed directly on data in your lakehouse (Iceberg, Parquet, Delta), with no data duplication or movement. Dremio's MCP server ensures that AI agents see only what they're authorized to see, while benefiting from the same semantic consistency and performance that teams rely on for analytics and BI.

You can use Dremio Cloud to:

**Query governed data:**  
"Show me weekly active users by region using the standard revenue and customer definitions."

**Leverage shared business metrics:**  
"What is gross margin by product line, based on our certified semantic models?"

**Combine data access with reasoning:**  
"Investigate the revenue drop last quarter by comparing customer churn and usage trends."

**Get table lineage and schemas:**  
"Show me the lineage for the customer\_metrics table and describe its schema."
